title: Forward-only OAB prediction of feedback-locked neural response
observer_O: pre-feedback offer-locked neural salience from M2 EEG only
actor_A: decision decisiveness based on accept/reject and offer extremity
bridge_B: pre-feedback temporal integration: similarity of current M2 neural vector to participant's previous M2 trial
primary_test: grouped held-out R2 comparison against baseline predictors
failure_conditions: OAB does not improve held-out performance over simpler baselines
phi scaling is non-identifiable or equivalent to arbitrary constants
honesty_note: This mapping is a proposed operationalization, not a discovery that the EEG variables inherently are Observer, Actor, or Bridge.
